# Route matching

## Intent

Match a request path to a route.

## Non-goals

- Not middleware.

## Requirements

### AC-001 — matches dynamic segments

When a path has dynamic segments, the matcher must bind them to params.

Verify with: `npm test -- router`

## Open questions

- None (non-blocking).

## Affected areas

- `src/router/match.ts`
- `src/router/params.ts`
